name: cozy
description: A comfortable study nook with warm lighting, a cup of tea, and the quiet focus of deep learning. This mood makes education feel like self-care — a warm, inviting space where knowledge flows naturally and without pressure.

style.lighting: warm desk lamp glow | soft natural reading light | amber ambient
style.color_grade: warm teal and cream tones | soft muted palette | gentle contrast
style.camera: close-up book and tea | medium shot study space | gentle handheld drift
style.composition: cozy corner framing | layered books and notes | personal study setup
style.props: open notebook, warm tea, desk lamp, potted plant, highlighted textbook, reading glasses
style.atmosphere: calm, focused, nurturing, warm, intellectually safe

copy_tone: Gentle and encouraging, like a mentor checking in. Uses phrases like 'take your time,' 'no rush to master this,' and 'every small step counts.' Creates a safe space for learning.

music.mood: lo-fi study beats, soft ambient piano, gentle rain

example_prompt_fragment: A cozy study nook with warm desk lamp lighting, an open notebook with handwritten notes beside a ceramic tea cup, potted plant in soft focus background, highlighted textbook with sticky notes, warm teal and cream color palette, gentle shallow depth of field, calm editorial lifestyle photography
